description: Add task statuses for pending, in progress, and done.

userStories.title: Add task status storage
userStories.description: As a user, I want tasks to persist status so existing and new tasks track pending, in progress, or done.
acceptanceCriteria: Task persistence includes status values with pending default.

userStories.title: Add backend status update action
userStories.description: As a user, I want status updates saved so task state remains consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Server action updates task status values.

userStories.title: Show task status badge
userStories.description: As a user, I want status badge on task cards so I can scan progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Task card renders badge based on status value.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control in list rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want change status from task list so updates are quick.
acceptanceCriteria: List row status control allows pending, in progress, and done.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task list status filter
userStories.description: As a user, I want filter task list by status so I can focus work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list supports filter by all status values.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
